text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is a special race whose
participants are chosen by fans in a vote.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond was second place in the vote,
and Kitasan Black was first.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's definitely gonna win today! The
way she perseveres right until the end is
unmatched!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
And when she hits that extra gear! No average
burst of speed can vie with that!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan's our shining star of hope! I hope she does
her very best!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Everyone was talking about Kita.
choice_data_list: You came in a close second, though!
You came in a close second, though!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're too kind, Trainer... I wouldn't exactly call
20,000 votes behind close.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But I'm still thrilled that so many people voted for
me. It's truly an honor. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I just get the impression that all of Kita's fans
support her so passionately.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They're not just cheering for her. They really care
about her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hm... I would be lying if I said I wasn't...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But the grass is always greener on the other side
of the fence, right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And thinking about all the disappointment I'm
about to put Kita's fans through gives me a bit of
a guilty conscience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond lets out a mischievous laugh.
She's already declaring her victory. This is very
promising.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's almost time. I'll be going now!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The runner bearing the name of a precious jewel
makes her dazzling entrance. Second place in the
fan vote, it's Satono Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And last but not least, it's the winner of the fan
vote, Kitasan Black!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...I'm finally here, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting for this moment, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the wait. Now, I'm going to prove to you
that I've truly caught up to you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: No... I'm going to completely surpass you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna let that happen! Let's do this, Dia!
